title: Maclurodendron oligophlebium
taxonomy: Maclurodendron oligophlebium is a species of plant within the family Rutaceae. It is native to the Pacific islands and is often found in forests and woodlands. The classification of Maclurodendron oligophlebium places it in the genus Maclurodendron and family Rutaceae. Further classification involves the order Sapindales and class Magnoliopsida. This plant is also known by its synonym, Acronia oligophlebia.
